7092.one_line_summary: Fixed-income bonds with coupon rates, maturity dates, and cross-chain support.
7092.notes: Introduces financial bond standard with named variables (coupon, principal, maturity) to improve upon ERC-3475; includes optional ESG parameters and cross-chain interface.

7093.one_line_summary: Social recovery interface supporting various guardian types and customizable recovery policies.
7093.notes: Separates identity verification (PermissionVerifier) from recovery policy logic (RecoveryPolicyVerifier) to enable flexible guardian types including off-chain identities; draft status.

7144.one_line_summary: ERC-20 extension adding validation step for transfers and approvals.
7144.notes: Extends ERC-20 with pending validations to prevent wallet draining; transfer/approve create pending validations instead of executing immediately.

7160.one_line_summary: Multiple metadata URIs per ERC-721 token with pinning capability.
7160.notes: Enables multi-metadata support for NFTs with ability to pin preferred URI; backward compatible with existing ERC-721.

7196.one_line_summary: Simplified token standard for smart contract wallets, removing approve/allowance/transferFrom.
7196.notes: Designed for AA wallets; removes ERC-20 approval mechanism in favor of wallet-level permission management; forward compatible with ERC-20.

7201.one_line_summary: Namespaced storage layout convention using NatSpec annotation and collision-safe hashing.
7201.notes: Standardizes storage location for modular contracts using @custom:storage-location; uses erc7201 formula: keccak256(keccak256(id)-1) & ~0xff.

7204.one_line_summary: Smart contract wallet token management with wallet-level approve and transfer hooks.
7204.notes: Enables token asset management within AA wallets via tokenApprove, tokenAllowance, tokenTransfer functions; supports batch operations and transfer hooks.

7208.one_line_summary: On-chain data containers abstracting storage from logic via Data Objects and Data Managers.
7208.notes: Separates data storage (Data Objects) from logic (Data Managers) using Data Points for indexing; enables data portability between Data Index implementations.

7231.one_line_summary: Identity-aggregated NFT binding Web2 and Web3 identities to tokens with verification.
7231.notes: Extends ERC-721 to aggregate multiple identities (Web2/Web3) with signature-based verification; includes custom schema in metadata.

7246.one_line_summary: Token encumber mechanism allowing pledge without transfer of ownership.
7246.notes: Stronger guarantee than ERC-20 allowance; encumbered tokens reserved but not transferred; useful for collateral and escrow scenarios.

7254.one_line_summary: Revenue-sharing token distributing profits to holders without locking/staking.
7254.notes: Extends ERC-20 with reward mechanisms; tracks inReward/outReward per account and allows periodic reward withdrawals.

7272.one_line_summary: Ethereum Access Token for off-chain service authorization of on-chain function calls.
7272.notes: EIP-712 conformant signed messages granting short-lived access to specific functions; includes expiry and replay protection.

7280.one_line_summary: NFT metadata extension with JSON-LD linked data support.
7280.notes: Adds linked_data array to metadata enabling schema-based semantic data; backward compatible with existing NFT metadata.

7291.one_line_summary: Purpose-bound money wrapping digital currency with conditional spending constraints.
7291.notes: ERC-1155 wrapper around ERC-20 sovToken implementing programmable money with whitelist/blacklist compliance checks; used for vouchers and escrow.

7303.one_line_summary: Token-controlled access via ERC-721/1155 control tokens representing privileges.
7303.notes: Uses token ownership as access control mechanism; roles granted/revoked via mint/burn of control tokens; visible in wallets.
